title: Brazilian-Style Charred Meat Curry
description: A flavorful and spicy curry made with charred meat and a blend of Brazilian spices. Serve with rice or naan bread for a delicious meal.

ingredients.name: Brazilian Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most grocery stores or online

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together the Brazilian Spice Blend, salt, and pepper.
2. Add the charred meat to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice blend.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
4. Heat the velvety curry sauce in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the marinated meat to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
6. Garnish with curry leaves and serve hot.
